title: thelypteris paraochthodes
intro: Thelypteris paraochthodes, also known as the Para Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a type of fern that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris paraochthodes include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Para Fern are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
